title: アイツらとブートキャンプ

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I don't even know why I bother with you...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I'm still not as good as I need to be... What am I
missing?)

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Oh, Taishin! Marvelous timing! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
We're looking for someone to hang out with!
Wanna join us?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pfft. As if I'd want to...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Wait. I heard hanging out with these two is like
going through boot camp.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Ugh, but even if that's true, they're such a pain
in the butt. And it's not like I have any obligation
to—)

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's go! ☆ Off we are to a marvelous
hang! ★

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hold on—I never agreed to... Hey! Stop pushing
me!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I've spotted an absolutely marvelous roller
coaster! ☆ Let's take it for a whirl! ★

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Damn, are they trying to speedrun the day? If I
throw in the towel now, I'll just feel like a loser!"

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Taishin, you're tough! But I know exactly
how you do it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(She's copying my tactics! Rrgh! If that's how it
is...)

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Hey, you two! Where should we go next?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I can't keep up anymore! No choice—I have to
get out of here!)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Taishin?! Where are you going?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I think I've got a handle on their movement
patterns. I don't have much strength left, so if I
want to escape, I'll have to be smart...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(There! I should be able to make a break for it
down this path!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Phew... There's no way they can catch up now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Haha, I totally gave those weirdos the slip.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I guess calling that a boot camp wasn't exactly
wrong...
